name: Okendo Reviews API
what_it_does: Okendo REST API for customer reviews and ratings platform built for Shopify. Enables AI agents to retrieve product reviews, manage review requests, access ratings analytics, and integrate Okendo review data into ecommerce and marketing workflows. Okendo is known for its deep Shopify integration and rich media review support.
use_cases: Retrieving product reviews and ratings from ecommerce analytics agents
Triggering post-purchase review request emails from order management agents
Accessing review analytics and sentiment data from product insights agents
Integrating Okendo review data into CRM and marketing personalization agents
not_for: Enterprise review management outside of ecommerce context
best_when: A Shopify merchant using Okendo wants AI agents to analyze customer reviews, automate review request workflows, and integrate UGC into marketing and product decisions.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer review data includes personal opinions and identity. Handle per GDPR requirements. Avoid automatically republishing customer content without appropriate terms.

auth.notes: Okendo API uses API key authentication. Keys are merchant-scoped and available in Okendo admin dashboard.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Growth, and Power plans scaling order volume
pricing.notes: Shopify-focused pricing based on order volume. Australian company. Competitive with Yotpo.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer review data and personal opinions — handle with appropriate PII governance
No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
Shopify-centric design — requires active Shopify store for full feature set
Australian company — AU data residency available for APAC merchants
Review request automation must comply with anti-spam laws in target markets
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer review PII. SOC2, GDPR. API key auth. Shopify merchant-scoped. AU data residency available.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer review PII. SOC2, GDPR. API key auth. AU data residency.
